settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Here you can adjust your settings and customize the app.

Dashboard.upcoming_matches_label: You are still missing {count, plural, one {# tip} other {# tips}} for the next 3 days
Dashboard.matches_remaining_count: You have {count, plural, one {# match} other {# matches}} left to predict for the next 7 days
Dashboard.all_predicted_message: Great job! You have predicted every match for the next week.
Dashboard.overview_placeholder: Here you'll see an overview of your recent tips and performance in this competition.

matches.title: Matches
matches.match_not_started_desc: Predictions from other users will be visible after the match starts
matches.description: List of all matches in this competition.
matches.match_locked: It is no longer possible to predict this match.
matches.no_matches_day: No matches scheduled for this day
matches.no_prediction: You have no prediction for this match.

dialog.title: Your Prediction
dialog.description: Enter final score (including OT and SO).
dialog.match_live: The match has already started. Predictions are closed.
dialog.match_finished: The match has already finished. Predictions are closed.

leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
leaderboard.description: Current player standings in the competition.
leaderboard.empty_state: Leaderboard will be available after the competition starts.
leaderboard.click_to_go_to_your_position: Click to jump to your position
leaderboard.name: Name
leaderboard.rank_update_info: Ranks update daily (05:00). Points update instantly.

hero.description: Predict hockey. Compete with the community. Rule the leaderboard.
hero.description_sub: No gambling, just pure passion for hockey.

dominance.title: Dominate on Ice
dominance.description: Gain respect in the community and climb to the top of the leaderboard.

leagues.title: Create Private Leagues
leagues.description: Invite friends and compete in private groups.

stats.title: Real-time Statistics
stats.description: Follow matches live and adjust your tips in real-time.

progress.title: Instant Progress
progress.description: Collect points and unlock exclusive rewards.

Auth.password_hint: Min. 8 characters, upper and lower case, number and special character.
Auth.registration_closed_desc: New player registration is currently paused. Please try again later or contact us.
Auth.forgot_password_subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you instructions to reset your password
Auth.register_success_description: We've sent a verification link to your email. Please check your inbox and confirm your roster spot before signing in.
Auth.verify_success: Your roster spot has been successfully confirmed! You can now sign in.
Auth.verify_error: Verification failed. The link may be invalid or expired.
Auth.verification_sent: A new verification email has been sent
Auth.marketing_label: I want to be in the first line! 🏒 Send me news from the locker room about new leagues and tweaks so I have the game under control.

errors.turnstile_error: Please confirm you are not a robot.
errors.unexpected_error: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
errors.username_too_short: Username must be at least 2 characters long
errors.password_too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters long
errors.username_already_exists: A user with this username already exists
errors.token_expired: Your session has expired. Please refresh the token or log in again.
errors.unauthorized: You do not have permission to access this resource. Please log in.
errors.username_too_long: Username can be at most 20 characters long
errors.username_invalid_characters: Only letters, numbers, dot, and underscore are allowed
errors.password_no_uppercase: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter
errors.password_no_lowercase: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter
errors.password_no_number: Password must contain at least one number
errors.password_no_special: Password must contain at least one special character
errors.gdpr_required: You must agree to the Terms and Conditions and acknowledge the Privacy Policy
errors.phone_number_too_short: Phone number must be at least 10 characters long
errors.organization_name_too_short: Organization name must be at least 2 characters long
errors.organization_slug_too_short: Organization slug must be at least 2 characters long
errors.phone_number_too_long: Phone number can be at most 15 characters long
errors.invalid_phone_number: Phone number can only contain numbers, spaces, and the + sign
errors.forbidden_superadmin: Access denied. System administrator rights required.
errors.forbidden_organization: Access denied. You do not have access to this organization.
errors.subscription_required: Your trial has expired. Please activate a subscription to continue.

gdpr_modal.title: Processing of Personal Data (GDPR)
gdpr_modal.intro: In accordance with Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (GDPR) and related laws, we process your personal data to the extent necessary to provide our services.
gdpr_modal.section1_content: The controller of your personal data is Slapshot Club.
gdpr_modal.section2_content: We process your data (email, username) for the purpose of:
gdpr_modal.list_item1: Creating and managing your game account
gdpr_modal.list_item2: Ensuring application functionality and saving your progress
gdpr_modal.section3_content: We store your data for the duration of your account. You can withdraw your consent at any time by deleting your account.
gdpr_modal.footer: Detailed privacy policy can be found in the full version of the document.

Auth.reset_password_subtitle: Enter your new password and get back in the game
Auth.reset_password_success: Password changed successfully! You can now log in.
Auth.redirect_to_app: You will be redirected to the app in a moment...
Auth.forgot_password_success: Instructions have been sent to your email.
Auth.forgot_password_success_desc: Please check your inbox for further instructions.

availability.taken_message: This {type, select, username {username} email {email} other {field}} is already offside (taken).
availability.cooldown_message: You're in the penalty box (cooldown). Try again in a moment.

Onboarding.title: Welcome to the Team! 🏒
Onboarding.pro_account_desc: You have a <r>FREE PRO account</r> until Aug 31, 2026! Enjoy all the benefits to the fullest.
Onboarding.pwa_android_desc: Menu (3 dots) -> Add to Home Screen / Install
Onboarding.pwa_ios_desc: Share (square with arrow) -> Add to Home Screen

Arena.title: Welcome to Slapshot Club
Arena.empty_state_desc: There are currently no competitions in this category. Check out other tabs or come back later.
Arena.assurance: We play for honor and prestige, not for money. 100% Fun.

join_modal.title: Join Competition
join_modal.description: You are not joined in {competitionName}. Do you want to join?
join_modal.registration_closed_description: Registration for the {competitionName} competition is not yet open. Please check back later.

Groups.title: Groups
Groups.description: Compete with friends and win it!
Groups.join_description: Enter the code from your friend and join the group.
Groups.join_request_sent: Request sent! Waiting for owner's approval.
Groups.no_leagues_joined: You are not in any groups yet.

create_modal.title: Create New Group
create_modal.premium_title: Group Creation is a Premium Feature
create_modal.premium_description: Custom groups are available for members with Pro or VIP accounts.

Groups.delete_confirm_desc: This action cannot be undone. All members will be removed.
Groups.kick_confirm_desc: Are you sure you want to remove {name} from the league?
Groups.transfer_confirm_desc: By this step, you will cease to be the owner of the league and {name} will become the new captain. This action is irreversible.
Groups.mobile_management_hint: Use desktop version for member management

cabin.title: Cabin & Banter
cabin.description: A space for discussion, heckling, and sharing tips with other league members is coming soon.

Groups.empty_state_title: You haven't created or joined any group yet.
Groups.no_leagues_hint: Create your own or join your friends using a code!

errors.user_not_pro_or_vip: You need a Pro or VIP account to create a group.
errors.max_joined_groups_reached: You have reached the maximum number of groups you can join.
errors.max_owned_groups_reached: You have reached the maximum number of groups you can own.
errors.max_groups_reached: You have reached the maximum number of groups.
errors.group_not_found: No group found with this code. Please check the code and try again.
errors.user_already_joined: You are already a member of this group.
errors.group_full: This group is full. You cannot join at this time.
errors.group_locked: This group is locked and not accepting new members.
errors.join_request_rejected: Your request to join has been rejected.
errors.not_a_member: You are not a member of this group.
errors.insufficient_permissions: You have insufficient permissions for this action.
errors.not_active: Your group membership is not active.
errors.insufficient_plan_for_ownership: This player does not have a sufficient plan to become a captain.
errors.user_not_competition_member: You are not a member of this competition.
errors.unexpected: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

validation.name_min: Name must be at least 3 characters.
validation.name_max: Name can be at most 100 characters.

Groups.require_approval_desc: New members must be approved by the captain.
Groups.allow_invites_desc: Other members can see and share the invite code.
Groups.require_alias_desc: Members must choose a group-specific nickname when joining.
Groups.status_updated_owner: Captain's armband has been successfully transferred.
Groups.status_updated_removed: Member has been successfully removed from the group.
Groups.role_updated_success: Member role has been successfully updated.
Groups.join_group_success: You have successfully joined the group.

NotFound.title: Icing!
NotFound.subtitle: REF CALLED AN OFFSIDE
NotFound.description: The puck got lost somewhere in the corner and your attack ended before it even started. This page isn't on the roster.

AccessDenied.title: Access Denied
AccessDenied.description: Your role does not have permission to enter this section.

UserManual.title: Game Rules
UserManual.description: Here you'll find everything you need to start collecting points.

rules_list.tip_before: Predictions are accepted until the start of the match. Then the match is locked.
rules_list.score_regular: Predictions are based on the final score (including overtime or shootout).
rules_list.exact_desc: If you guess the exact score, you get 5 points.
rules_list.diff_desc: If you guess the winner and the exact goal difference, you get 3 points.
rules_list.winner_desc: If you guess the winner but not the exact score or difference, you get 2 points.
rules_list.evaluation: Points are added to your account automatically after official evaluation.

UserManual.no_competitions: There are currently no active competitions with custom scoring.

community.title: Community
community.description: Create your own hockey locker room for your friends or colleagues.

management.title: Member Management
management.description: The group owner (Captain) has full control over who can join.

codes.title: Invite Codes
codes.description: Easy sharing using unique codes that you generate.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.description: Option to set the group as private or public according to your needs.

UserManual.groups_limits_desc: Different membership levels bring different possibilities within groups.

verification.subject: 🏒 Confirm your roster spot at Slapshot Club!
verification.title: Welcome to the team, {username}!
verification.message: The coach has just assigned you a spot on the Slapshot Club roster. Your jersey is already hanging in the locker room, but before you hit the ice, we need to confirm your identity.
verification.footer:
See you in the arena!
SLAPSHOT CLUB • 2026

forgotPassword.subject: 🔑 Lost puck? Reset your password!
forgotPassword.title: Timeout, {username}?
forgotPassword.message: Looks like you lost the puck (or your password) somewhere in the corner of the rink. No worries, we'll get you a quick reset so you can score again in the next shift.

Account.title: My Account
Account.subtitle: Manage your personal details and security.

notifications.title: Push Notifications
notifications.description: Receive alerts about matches, results, and important league changes directly to your device.
notifications.permission_denied_hint: Notifications are blocked in your browser. Please allow them in site settings.
notifications.coming_soon: Notification settings will be available soon.

Account.username_description: Change your public name in the leaderboards.
Account.email_hint: For security reasons, the email can only be changed by an administrator.
Account.security_description: Make sure your password is strong enough.

email_modal.title: Email Change Request
email_modal.description: Enter your new email and reason. An administrator will contact you.
email_modal.reason_placeholder: Enter reason why you need to change your email...

Account.location_description: Optional details for statistics. Help us better understand our community.
Account.location_other_hint: If you didn't find your country in the list, enter it here. An administrator will review and add it later.
Account.location_other_notice: Thank you! An admin will add your country.
Account.referral_description: Share this registration link and earn bonus points for every new teammate.

Feedback.title: Feedback
Feedback.description: Have an idea or found a bug? Let us know!
Feedback.message_placeholder: Describe your idea or bug report...
Feedback.success: Thank you! We received your feedback.

Header.select_league_desc: Choose the leaderboard you want to follow.
Header.no_leagues: You are not in any other mini-leagues yet.
Header.all_tipped_message: Great job! You have predicted all upcoming matches.

MiniLeagueRules.capacity_description: Players always create <r>private</r> mini leagues. League capacity is not fixed, but <r>dynamic</r>.
MiniLeagueRules.capacity_rule_pro: <r>Pro</r> member increases capacity by <r>5 spots</r> (1 for themselves + 4 Free).
MiniLeagueRules.capacity_rule_vip: <r>VIP</r> member increases capacity by <r>10 spots</r> (1 for themselves + 9 Free).
MiniLeagueRules.capacity_hint: The more paying players you have in the league, the larger the capacity for others.
MiniLeagueRules.owner_right_invite_desc: Only the owner can see the invitation code.
MiniLeagueRules.owner_right_approval_desc: Owner must approve every new member (Waiting List).
MiniLeagueRules.owner_right_management_desc: Can kick members or delete the league.
MiniLeagueRules.owner_right_transfer_desc: Can transfer the "captain's armband" to another member.

orientation_lock.title: Rotate your device
orientation_lock.message: For the best experience, please use the app in portrait mode.

PlayerDetail.historyLockedDesc: Detailed prediction history of other players is visible only to Slapshot Club members.
PlayerDetail.vip_privacy_desc: This player has a VIP membership. Their prediction history is private and cannot be viewed.
PlayerDetail.history_locked_desc: To access the full prediction history, activate
PlayerDetail.notSignedToOtherCompetitions: Player is not signed to other competitions

match_finished.message: Match finished. You got {points} points for your tip!

match_reminder.message: {missingTipsCount, select, undefined {Match starts soon. Don't forget to tip!} other {You have {missingTipsCount} missing {missingTipsCount, plural, one {tip} other {tips}} for matches starting within an hour.}}

daily_tips_reminder.title: Daily Tips Reminder
daily_tips_reminder.message: {missingTipsCount, select, undefined {Don't forget to submit your tips for today's matches!} other {You have {missingTipsCount} missing {missingTipsCount, plural, one {tip} other {tips}} for the next 24 hours.}}

competition_finished.title: Competition Finished
competition_finished.message: Competition {competitionName} has finished. Check the final leaderboard!

new_announcement.title: {title_en}
new_announcement.message: A new announcement has been published. Check it out in the News section!

403.title: Penalty Box!
403.description: You don't have permission to view this content. The referee sent you to the penalty box.

404.title: Icing!
404.description: The puck got lost in the corner. This page is not on the roster.

500.title: Broken Plexiglass!
500.description: A technical error occurred at the stadium. Our tech team is sharpening their skates to fix it.

generic.title: Oops! Something Blew Up
generic.description: An unexpected error occurred on the server. Please try again later.

Announcements.title: Announcements - Administration

form.is_pinned_desc: The announcement will be displayed at the top of the news list.
form.title: Title
form.excerpt_placeholder: Short summary for notifications and lists
form.content_placeholder: Main text of the announcement (supports Markdown)

errors.slug_min: Slug must be at least 3 characters long
errors.slug_format: Slug must be in kebab-case and lowercase (a-z, 0-9, -)
errors.title_min: Title must be at least 3 characters long
errors.excerpt_max: Excerpt must be at most 500 characters long
errors.content_min: Content must be at least 10 characters long

Announcements.unsaved_changes: You have unsaved changes in the form
Announcements.delete_confirm_desc: This action cannot be undone. This announcement will be permanently removed from all language versions.
Announcements.publish_confirm_irreversible: Are you sure you want to publish? This action is irreversible and the announcement will no longer be editable or deletable.
